channel.title: Field Theory on CommonGoodCauseMeditation
channel.description: Recent content in Field Theory on CommonGoodCauseMeditation

item.title: The Power of Synchronicity
item.description:
The concept of synchronized global meditation isn’t just a beautiful metaphor for unity; it rests on the intersection of deep contemplative traditions and modern interpretations of localized field theory.

What is Coherence?

When we synchronize our breath and intention, we begin to act like a large-scale oscillating network.

  • The Individual: Focus calms the nervous system, dropping the mind into Alpha and Theta wave states.
  • The Group: When critical mass is reached simultaneously, the localized electromagnetic field generated by human bio-rhythms aligns.

“A single drop creates a ripple. A thousand drops in sync create a wave that moves the ocean.”
